metadata.description: AI SEO / GEO skills for Claude Code by Zara Hunter (Edk8Agentic) — helping teams, including Arabic / MENA builders, get cited by AI answer engines.

plugins.name: ai-seo
plugins.description: Optimize content to get retrieved and cited as a source inside AI answers (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Gemini, Copilot, Claude). Covers AI-visibility audits, page optimization, AI-first content, entity presence, monitoring, hard cases, and a dedicated MENA / Arabic playbook.
